name: freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month, disorganized expense tracking causes late payments. We automate expense categorization instead of manual expense tracking and reporting.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking and categorizing expenses from various sources.
